h1: The Inception Fireplace: Redefining Realism in Electric Fireplaces
h2: Traditional or Modern? Find Your Perfect Style

paragraphs: Welcome to the era of natural, mesmerizing flames in electric fireplaces! The Inception electric fireplace from SimpliFire, is a remarkable innovation that combines the convenience of an electric fireplace with the astonishing realism of a traditional flame. This is achieved through the Digital Spark™ technology. The flame truly so astonishing that it will leave you wondering if it's gas or electric. It's the perfect solution for those who desire the beauty of a real fire but prefer the ease and simplicity of electric.

To enhance the realism, the Inception electric fireplace comes with hand-painted logs and a glowing LED ember bed. The logs have been meticulously crafted to resemble natural wood, adding a touch of authenticity to your fireplace. The LED ember bed complements the flames, creating a warm and inviting ambiance in any room.

Versatility is another advantage of the Inception electric fireplace. It can be easily installed in any room, thanks to its slim profile that takes up minimal floor space. If you want a built-in look without the hassle of construction, you can opt for the Wescott Mantel Kit. This kit allows you to seamlessly integrate the Inception into your room, enhancing its aesthetic appeal.
To learn more about the Inception electric fireplace, find a dealer near you!

The Format is the best electric fireplace for sleek, minimal style that requires zero hassle to hang. With its floating mantel, this white electric fireplace provides glow from LED flames, as well as moody mantel downlighting. Enjoy it year-round with or without heat. Available in 43-inch, 50-inch, and 60-inch fireplace widths.

With the modern design of the Allusion Platinum, you can easily create a cozy atmosphere with an optional build-out kit or wall-mount kit, or enjoy a built-in, flush design installed by pros. Use this electric fireplace year-round, with or without heat. Available in 50-inch, 60-inch, and 72-inch fireplace widths.
Everything you need to know about electric fireplaces, from how they operate to installation options.
No matter your design style, Heat & Glo has the perfect fireplace for your dream home.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
